description: Chronograph provides portfolio monitoring, analytics, valuation, reporting, and data management software for private capital investors. Its products are aimed at general partners and limited partners managing private market investment data.
summary: Chronograph exposes a documented MCP server endpoint at `https://ai.chronograph.pe/mcp` (streamable HTTP); no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI integration surface could be verified from the site, and MCP authentication details were not publicly documented.
